sections.heading: TL;DR (Too Long; Didn't Read)
content: This summary gives you the key points of our Privacy Policy in plain language. It does not replace the full policy, which you should read for complete details about how your data is handled.
<ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">
• No accounts, no analytics, no ads. We do not operate user accounts or track how you use the App.
• Listing data: The App fetches apprenticeship vacancy information from the UK government's Find an apprenticeship service when you browse or search. We do not store that listing data on our servers.
• Favourites only: The only data the App saves is your saved favourites. These are stored on your device using Core Data and may sync to iCloud across your Apple devices.
• We do not receive your favourites. Saved listings stay on your device and in your personal iCloud account. We cannot see them.
• No selling or sharing of personal data with advertisers or data brokers.

sections.heading: Introduction
content: Welcome to UK Apprenticeships. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use our application (hereafter referred to as "the App").

The App helps you browse and filter apprenticeship vacancies published on the UK government's Find an apprenticeship website. Vacancy information is retrieved from the government's Display advert API when you use the App. You can save vacancies as favourites for easy access later.
We are committed to data minimisation and transparency. By using the App, you agree to the terms outlined in this Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: Collection of Personal Data
content: What we do not collect
The App does not include:
<ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">
• User accounts or sign-in
• Analytics, advertising identifiers, or behavioural tracking
• A backend that stores your browsing history or favourites
We do not ask for your name, email address, or other contact details within the App.
Data processed when you use the App

Apprenticeship listings: When you browse, search, or filter vacancies, the App sends requests to the UK government's Find an apprenticeship API to retrieve listing information. These requests may include search terms and filter criteria you choose (for example, location or apprenticeship level). We do not store this data on our servers. The Department for Education processes API requests under its own terms and policies.

Saved favourites: If you save a vacancy as a favourite, the App stores a reference to that listing on your device using Core Data. If you are signed in to iCloud on your device, favourites may sync to your personal iCloud account so they appear on your other Apple devices. This data is not sent to us and we cannot access it.
We do not receive or store favourites or browsing activity on any server we operate.

sections.heading: Use of Personal Data
content: We do not collect personal data from you. We do not use, process, or analyse your favourites or browsing activity.
The App uses the government's API solely to display vacancy information you request. Saved favourites are used only to show you your saved listings within the App.

sections.heading: Sharing of Personal Data
content: We do not sell your personal data. We do not share personal data with advertisers or data brokers.
Because we do not collect personal data, there is nothing for us to share. Your favourites remain on your device and in your iCloud account under Apple's control.

sections.heading: Third-Party Services
content: <ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">

• Find an apprenticeship (Department for Education): Vacancy data is provided by the UK government's Find an apprenticeship service via the Display advert API. When you browse or search, your device communicates directly with that API. This is subject to the Department for Education's API terms. We are not the data provider and do not control how the government processes API requests.
• Apple (iOS, Core Data, iCloud): Favourites stored on your device and synced via iCloud are processed by Apple under its own terms and privacy policies. See Apple's Privacy Policy.
The App does not integrate analytics SDKs, advertising networks, or social login providers.

sections.heading: Cookies and Other Technologies
content: UK Apprenticeships is a native iOS application and does not use cookies or web trackers. Local storage on your device is used only to support saved favourites.

sections.heading: International Data Transfers
content: We do not operate a user-account database or store your favourites on our servers.
If you use iCloud sync, Apple may process and store your favourites in data centres outside your country of residence, in accordance with Apple's policies and safeguards.
API requests to the Find an apprenticeship service are handled by the Department for Education and its infrastructure.

sections.heading: Data Retention & Storage
content: <ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">
• Favourites: Saved on your device and, if enabled, in your personal iCloud account until you remove them or delete the App.
• Listing data: Vacancy information fetched from the API is displayed in the App but is not persistently stored by us. It may be temporarily cached on your device for performance.
• Deletion: Deleting the App removes its local data from your device. To remove iCloud data, use your device or iCloud settings.

sections.heading: Protection of Personal Data
content: We apply a data minimisation approach:
<ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">
• No account system and no collection of personal data by us
• Favourites stored locally and in your iCloud account, not on our servers
• No analytics or behavioural tracking
No method of transmission or storage is completely secure, but we aim to minimise risk by collecting as little data as possible.

sections.heading: Your Privacy Rights & Choices
content: Depending on where you live (for example, the UK or EEA), you may have rights in relation to personal data held about you.

Because the App does not collect personal data and favourites stay on your device or in your iCloud account, you control that data directly. You can remove favourites in the App, delete the App to remove local data, or manage iCloud data through Apple.
To exercise any rights that may apply to us or to ask questions, contact us using the details in Contact Us.

sections.heading: Children & Privacy
content: The App is intended for a general audience. We do not knowingly collect personal data from anyone, including children.

sections.heading: Changes to This Policy
content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in the App, legal requirements, or our practices. When we make significant changes, we will update the "Last Updated" date at the top and, where appropriate, provide notice within the App.
Continued use of the App after changes take effect constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.heading: Contact Us
content: If you have questions about this policy or your data, please contact:
Email: hello@cumuluscoding.com
When emailing us, please include the app name first, followed by your subject in the email's subject line.
For example: UK Apprenticeships - [Your Subject Here]
